description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this mid-ankle leather boot from timberland. The leather lends it a natural colour finish that enhances your style quotient immensely.UpperLeather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleMid-high ankle for enhanced style and better support to the lower legMesh inner lining with a padded collar and tongue for ultimate breathabilityLace-up system for a snug, customised FitErgonomically padded leather footbed for sweat-free comfortMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleTPU outsole with a stacked heelAggressive lugs on the fore foot and heelshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
